productDisplayName: Manchester United Men Printed Yellow T-Shirt
description: Composition Yellow round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, a ribbed neckline and graphic print on the chest Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold with like colours below 40 degrees Do not bleach Tumble dry low Warm iron do not iron on decorations What better way to show your support for the team than to slip into this stylish t-shirt from manchester united! The soft cotton fabric offers exemplary dry comfort, making it a great everyday wear for your casual days. Team this with track pants or shorts and running shoes. Add a hooded sweatshirt for exemplary comfort during winters. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
